notes: Supplemental low-frequency bad-side verbs for v2 causative/inchoative licensing.
Frequency is checked by the builder with FreqBLiMP wordfreq Zipf scores; these entries are curation candidates, not automatic evidence.
Subject compatibility is intentionally not used as a hard filter. Analyze by subject/context after model runs.
